summary: Completed comprehensive backend testing of Level 2 Access Card system. All 19 access card features tested successfully, plus 22 regression tests for existing DexScreener integration. Email flow, PIL rendering, security, and idempotency all working correctly.
passed_tests: POST /api/access-card/request with email returns valid accreditation number matching DS-02-XXXX-XXXX-XX pattern
POST /api/access-card/request with display_name correctly uses custom name
Idempotency: same email returns same accreditation number on multiple requests
POST /api/access-card/verify with valid accreditation returns session token with 24h expiry
POST /api/access-card/verify with invalid accreditation returns 'Accreditation not recognized'
GET /api/access-card/status with valid X-Session-Token returns accreditation and display name
GET /api/access-card/status with missing/invalid token returns ok:false
GET /api/access-card/image/{accreditation} returns PNG card image (1MB+ size confirms PIL rendering)
Email flow verification: access_card.sent and email.delivered events found in /api/admin/email-events
PIL rendering working: generated cards are 1MB+ indicating proper template overlay
Regression: public /api/vault/state hides admin fields but exposes dex_mode, dex_label, dex_pair_symbol
Regression: all existing endpoints (whitelist, prophecy, stats, admin endpoints) still working
All 22 DexScreener integration tests still passing
Security: admin endpoints require JWT authentication
Security: public endpoints don't expose sensitive data
